hero.title: Find your people. Make your mark.
hero.copy: A spirited clan built on loyalty, creativity, and the kind of teamwork that turns every session into a story.

about.title: More than a clan. It’s a constellation.
about.lead: HUDAS is a welcoming corner for bold players, creative minds, and dependable teammates. We show up for the win, but stay for the people.
about.note: Bring your own light. We’ll make room for it.
about.value2Copy: Bring ideas, energy, and a little chaos.
about.value3Copy: Everyone gets a chance to shine.

officers.title: Meet the officers
officers.copy: The officers guiding the crew, the laughs, and the late-night plans.
officers.managerCopy: Upload a portrait for any officer. Your images are saved for this HUDAS roster, and you can remove them whenever you like.
officers.fileType: Please choose a PNG, JPG, WEBP, or GIF image.
officers.fileTooLarge: That image is too large. Please choose one under 10 MB.
officers.noCustom: This officer is using the shared dummy portrait.
officers.storageError: We couldn’t save that image. Please try again.

gallery.title: A little moodboard
gallery.copy: No two nights look the same around here.

rules.title: Simple rules. Strong orbit.
rules.respect: Treat every member with respect. Keep the space safe, welcoming, and free of drama.
rules.communicate: Communicate clearly. Give the crew a heads-up when plans change.
rules.contribute: Bring something to the table, whether that’s skill, ideas, support, or good vibes.
rules.haveFun: Have fun and make room for others to do the same. We’re here to enjoy the ride.

footer.copy: Built with heart, held by the crew.

modal.title: Ready to join HUDAS?
modal.copy: Tell us a little about yourself. The crew will be in touch.
modal.name: Name or alias
modal.reasonPlaceholder: Tell us what brings you here...
modal.successCopy: Your signal is in the stars. We’ll get back to you soon.

admin.pageCopy: Manage the portraits shown on the HUDAS officer roster.
admin.title: Sign in to roster admin
admin.copy: Use your HUDAS admin credentials to manage officer portraits.
admin.invalid: That username or password is not valid.
admin.authRequired: Please sign in to your Miniapps account before saving images.
admin.storageError: We couldn’t access the image database. Please try again.
